feedback.text: I support the initiatives, for a long time, I am happy to believe in the good wishes of publishers, but legislation is not keeping pace with technological developments, which does not mean that it does not have to be changed by law. As a consumer, I have certain rights and don’t like me from the game of the courpile x years ago, because the publisher of non-wash servers and I am not able to fire the title. There is also a need to clarify the rules for digitally buying games, the framework is a lot to improve.
